subcodes.first_line: O Dawning-Place of the favours of the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name! Night and day art thou remembered in this realm and in this gathering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مطلع عنایت جمال قدم و اسم اعظم در این بساط شب و روز مذکوری و در این انجمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
